title: Validate GNSS build/provision epoch floor on physical receivers
description: Hardware validation follow-up from project-LICHEN-xj8k. The no-hardware decision accepts firmware build epoch and optional board provision epoch only as a lower-bound freshness floor, not an authoritative clock source. Validate on physical GNSS-capable targets that cold-start/default GNSS timestamps below the effective epoch floor are rejected for wall-clock establishment, that valid GNSS time at or above the floor is accepted, and that position fixes can remain usable with fix_time_unix_valid=false when time is rejected. Requires physical GNSS hardware and real/controlled GNSS time behavior, so skip in no-hardware loops.
